project.title: Fomitopsis pinicola protein profiles in normoxia and anoxia using fungal solid-state cultures on pine
project.projectDescription: The proteomes of Fomitopsis pinicola was established from fungal solid-state cultures on pine in normoxia (air) and anoxia (N2) by shotgun proteomics and compared to characterize the molecular modifications induced by each condition.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein samples were loaded on a SDS-PAGE for a short migration, excised from a single polyacrylamide band, digested by trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed with a Q-Exactive HF tandem mass spectrometer.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT against a database comprising the protein sequences from Fomitopsis pinicola, the results were then parsed, spectral counts were extracted and compared.

Wood decay under anoxia by the brown-rot fungus Fomitopsis pinicola. Nat Commun. 2025 16(1):7352
